title: NYSE Real Time Analysis
description: Crafted a comprehensive application encompassing all companies listed in the New York Stock Exchange, providing real day updates and analysis on firm activities and developments.

title: Real-Time Data Streaming Architecture
description: Designed a cloud-native real-time streaming pipeline using AWS Kinesis, Lambda, S3, Glue, and Athena to capture, transform, and analyze big data streams cleanly.

title: World Bank Projects in Taiwan - R Shiny Application
description: Developed a R Shiny application utilizing dplyr, tidyverse, and ggplot2 to visualize World Bank project trends in Taiwan, allowing researchers to interact with archival data and derive policy prescriptions on determining loan rates.

title: Predictive Property Assessment Modeling
description: Utilized advanced machine learning frameworks (random forests) and statistical programming tools (R) to evaluate large-scale regional real estate assessment values.

title: Restaurant Business Analytics Project
description: Leveraged Excel to evaluate sales revenue and profit margins across third-party delivery services and restaurant website, helping the business identify top-performing platforms and implement promotion tactics to boost direct sales. Conducted time-series analysis on consumer preferences and spending patterns, utilizing monthly purchasing trends to enhance pricing strategies and increase marketing campaigns around menu items with high customer demand.

title: Military and Education Expenditure - R Shiny Application
description: Cleaned, wrangled, and standardized large-scale World Bank datasets using dplyr and tidyverse, resolving missing values, formatting inconsistencies, and duplicate entries to ensure high-quality, reliable data for economic analysis. Created visualizations with ggplot2 to illustrate trends in military expenditure (1960–2019) and explored correlations between education spending and unemployment (2022), highlighting regional disparities and policy-relevant insights.
